docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $330.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, RAMON AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, RAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-31-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
